title: DiagnosticRedaction
description: Contract for local diagnostic redaction. Before any diagnostic artifact (log, transcript, capture, agent output) crosses the device boundary or is stored in shared operation state, it must pass a redaction contract. The redaction contract records which rules were applied, what categories of sensitive data were targeted, and whether the result was verified.

id.description: Unique redaction record identifier (ULID or UUID).

originalRef.description: Content-addressable reference to the unredacted artifact. Must remain local to the device and must not be exported.

redactedRef.description: Content-addressable reference to the redacted artifact safe for export.

artifactKind.description: The kind of artifact being redacted.

rules.description: Ordered list of redaction rules applied.

category.description: Category of sensitive data targeted by this rule.

matchCount.description: Number of matches found and redacted.

redactedBy.description: Component that applied redaction (e.g. sourceos-redact, agent-machine-redact).

verified.description: Whether the redacted artifact was verified by a secondary scan for remaining sensitive patterns.

verificationRef.description: Reference to the verification scan result.
